public_label: Recorded online submissions per 1000 registered patient-months
analytical_definition: One thousand times total recorded OCS submissions divided by summed monthly registered-list exposure
missing_value_rule: Undefined denominator remains NULL; no imputation
interpretation: Relative volume of recorded online submissions normalised for practice list-size exposure
interpretation_caution: Not all practice demand; affected by supplier participation, system availability and patient digital use

public_label: Clinical share of recorded online submissions
analytical_definition: Annual clinical OCS submissions divided by annual total OCS submissions
missing_value_rule: Zero annual total leaves the ratio undefined and the practice is excluded
eligibility_requirement: Positive annual OCS total and 12 OCS months
interpretation: Composition of recorded online submissions classified as clinical
interpretation_caution: Classification varies by supplier/patient input; not patient case mix or clinical need

public_label: Administrative share of recorded online submissions
analytical_definition: Annual administrative OCS submissions divided by annual total OCS submissions
missing_value_rule: Zero annual total leaves the ratio undefined and the practice is excluded
eligibility_requirement: Positive annual OCS total and 12 OCS months
interpretation: Composition of recorded online submissions classified as administrative
interpretation_caution: Other/unknown is the residual composition; not administrative workload

analytical_definition: One thousand times total recorded GPAD appointments divided by summed monthly registered-list exposure
missing_value_rule: Undefined denominator remains NULL; no imputation
interpretation: Relative volume of recorded scheduled appointment activity normalised for list size
interpretation_caution: GPAD is not total workload, capacity, unmet need or demand

analytical_definition: Annual DNA appointments divided by annual total appointments
missing_value_rule: Zero annual total remains undefined; no imputation
eligibility_requirement: 12 GPAD months and positive annual total
interpretation: Recorded status composition of scheduled activity
interpretation_caution: Recording practices and the unknown status category affect interpretation; not a quality score

analytical_definition: Annual face-to-face appointments divided by annual total appointments
numerator: Annual appointments with mode face to face
missing_value_rule: Zero annual total remains undefined; no imputation
eligibility_requirement: 12 GPAD months and reconciled mode categories
interpretation: Recorded mode composition of scheduled activity
interpretation_caution: Mode is set/mapped from practice systems and may not represent the actual care setting

analytical_definition: Annual telephone appointments divided by annual total appointments
missing_value_rule: Zero annual total remains undefined; no imputation
eligibility_requirement: 12 GPAD months and reconciled mode categories
interpretation: Recorded telephone-mode composition of scheduled activity
interpretation_caution: Telephone lists and locally recorded modes vary; not total telephone contact

public_label: Same-day booking share of recorded appointments
analytical_definition: Annual same-day appointments divided by annual total appointments
numerator: Annual appointments in exact SAME DAY band
missing_value_rule: Unknown/data-issue remains a separate category; no imputation
eligibility_requirement: 12 GPAD months and reconciled booking categories
interpretation: Share of recorded appointments booked on the same calendar date
interpretation_caution: Influenced by urgency, patient choice, availability and recording; not independently service quality

public_label: One-to-seven-day booking share of recorded appointments
analytical_definition: Separately calculated 1-day share plus separately calculated 2-to-7-day share
eligibility_requirement: 12 GPAD months and mutually exclusive booking bands
interpretation: Share of recorded appointments booked 1-7 calendar days before the appointment
interpretation_caution: Does not include same-day activity and does not independently measure access quality

public_label: Eight-to-fourteen-day booking share of recorded appointments
analytical_definition: Annual 8-to-14-day appointments divided by annual total appointments
numerator: Annual appointments in exact 8 TO 14 DAYS band
eligibility_requirement: 12 GPAD months and reconciled booking categories
interpretation: Share of recorded appointments booked 8-14 calendar days before the appointment
interpretation_caution: Elapsed booking time does not measure time spent attempting to obtain an appointment

public_label: Over-fourteen-day booking share of recorded appointments
analytical_definition: Annual 15-21, 22-28 and more-than-28-day appointments divided by annual total appointments
numerator: Annual appointments in 15-21 plus 22-28 plus more-than-28-day bands
eligibility_requirement: 12 GPAD months and mutually exclusive booking bands
interpretation: Share of recorded appointments booked more than 14 calendar days ahead
interpretation_caution: Includes planned/repeat activity and patient choice; not independently a delay or quality measure

public_label: Mean absolute monthly change in online-submission rate
analytical_definition: Mean of 11 absolute adjacent-month differences in monthly OCS submissions per 1000 registered patients
numerator: Absolute month-to-month changes in monthly OCS rate
missing_value_rule: Any missing monthly rate prevents complete eligibility; no imputation
eligibility_requirement: 12 ordered OCS months and 12 positive denominators
interpretation: Within-practice temporal variation in the recorded monthly OCS rate
interpretation_caution: Can reflect seasonality, availability, supplier reporting and list changes; not demand volatility alone

public_label: Mean absolute monthly change in appointment rate
analytical_definition: Mean of 11 absolute adjacent-month differences in monthly GPAD appointments per 1000 registered patients
numerator: Absolute month-to-month changes in monthly GPAD rate
missing_value_rule: Any missing monthly rate prevents complete eligibility; no imputation
eligibility_requirement: 12 ordered GPAD months and 12 positive denominators
interpretation: Within-practice temporal variation in the recorded monthly appointment rate
interpretation_caution: Can reflect recording and calendar effects; not workload or demand volatility alone
